appraisal_events.evidence: la découverte que Swann avait des amitiés puissantes dont il n'avait jamais parlé
appraisal_events.explanation: The passage reports the discovery that Swann has powerful connections, which implicitly raises his standing; M. Verdurin notices the bad effect this has on his wife.

status_effects.explanation: Swann is locally elevated by the revelation of his 'amitiés puissantes.'
